title: GCD And Bezout Witness Checks

solver_reuse.target: gcd Bezout Diophantine obstruction QF_LIA regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Fixed linear Diophantine obstruction where gcd(6,10)=2 does not divide the target 15, so 6*x + 10*y = 15 has no integer solution.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional divisibility rows only when they add distinct integer-linear gcd, divisibility, or modular solver pressure; keep unique factorization and prime-distribution theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode gcd and divisibility checks as deterministic LIA or BV/LIA obligations.
Replay SAT witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Emit and check UnsatDiophantine evidence for fixed unsolvable linear equations.
Keep unique factorization and infinite prime-distribution theorems marked Lean-horizon.
